overall.description: A smooth camera walk around the Montreal Olympic Stadium in a game engine simulation, showcasing the iconic inclined tower and curved concrete roof structure. The journey transitions from open concrete plazas to grassy hillsides with scattered trees, then onto an elevated paved walkway, all under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete plaza at base of Olympic stadium inclined tower

agents.ego_description: moving steadily forward across the open concrete plaza toward the stadium structure

entered.detail: distinctive white concrete inclined tower with dark triangular panel sections
series of curved concrete roof sections with green-tinted windows
expansive light-colored concrete surface surrounding the stadium

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the iconic Montreal Olympic Stadium, with its massive inclined tower dominating the left side of the frame. The camera moves steadily forward across the expansive concrete plaza, with the curved roof structure of the stadium visible ahead under a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside ascending alongside stadium exterior

events.description: transitioning from concrete plaza onto grassy slope beside the stadium

agents.ego_description: walking uphill on the grassy slope while passing alongside the stadium's curved exterior

entered.detail: green grassy hillside with scattered wildflowers ascending alongside the stadium
cluster of green leafy trees on the hillside to the right

segments.scene_description: The camera leaves the concrete plaza behind and begins ascending a grassy hillside that runs alongside the stadium. The inclined tower disappears from view as the curved roof sections of the stadium dominate the left side, while trees become visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooded grassy hillside with mature trees

events.description: passing close to a large tree while continuing uphill

agents.ego_description: navigating up through the grassy terrain passing close to large deciduous trees

entered.detail: mature tree with spreading branches and dense green foliage

segments.scene_description: Continuing up the grassy hillside, the camera moves through denser vegetation with mature trees on the right side. The stadium's curved concrete structure remains visible on the left, while the path winds through the green terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated paved walkway with retaining walls

events.description: transitioning from grassy terrain onto paved stone walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated paved walkway beside the stadium concrete walls

entered.detail: elevated stone-paved walkway with patterned concrete surface
low concrete walls lining both sides of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the grassy hillside onto an elevated paved walkway with concrete retaining walls. The stadium structure is now very close on the left, showing the detailed concrete architecture of the curved roof sections, while the path continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an expansive concrete plaza into a lush, ascending hillside. It begins with a steady forward glide across the open pavement, where the massive inclined tower of the Montreal Olympic Stadium dominates the left side of the frame under a bright blue sky. As the camera moves forward, the concrete gives way to a grassy slope that runs alongside the stadium's structure. The scene then shifts as the inclined tower disappears from view, leaving the curved roof sections to dominate the left while scattered trees emerge on the right.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a lush, vegetated hillside to a structured, elevated concrete walkway. It begins by winding up a grassy slope, moving through dense vegetation and past mature trees on the right while the stadium's curved concrete form remains visible to the left. As the camera progresses, the natural terrain gives way to a paved path flanked by concrete retaining walls. The scene then shifts to a closer perspective of the stadium, bringing the detailed architecture of the curved roof sections into sharp focus on the left as the camera continues forward along the elevated walkway.
